name: HR benefits enrollment policy example
answer:
Employees receive health coverage after 30 days of employment.
Employees receive health coverage after 60 days of employment.
Employees receive a monthly home-office stipend.

sources.title: HR Benefits Enrollment Policy
sources.content:
Employees receive health coverage after 60 days of employment.
Employees may enroll in the company dental plan during their first 30 days.
